title: ononis natrix subsp. angustissima
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. angustissima, also known as Narrow-leaved Restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its narrow, hairy leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subsp. angustissima include its potential to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ononis natrix subsp. angustissima can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
